title: Zillow Group Class C Earnings Calendar and Forecasts
text: Zillow Earnings Calendar and Historical Estimates. Q1 2024 Earnings: Zillow reported Q1 revenue of $708M, compared to a consensus estimate of $705.15M. The results indicate that Zillow's first-quarter shareholder letter emphasized the company's transformation into an AI-powered real estate platform, citing AI-driven productivity gains. The home-listing site logged a profit of $46 million, but traffic fell 3% to 220 million average monthly unique users. For the upcoming quarter, the company guided Q2 adjusted EBITDA of $150M-$165M. The search results show analyst reactions, with several firms adjusting their price targets following the Q1 results. Historical Consensus: Over the prior years, Zillow had beaten EPS estimates 50% of the time and beaten revenue estimates 75% of the time, showing a mixed track record in meeting expectations.
